turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" role="img" aria-label="enlightenment">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#0b1020"/>

  <!-- Outer glow -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="270" r="140" fill="#ffd27a" opacity="0.12"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="270" r="110" fill="#ffd27a" opacity="0.18"/>

  <!-- Rays -->
  <g opacity="0.95">
    <g fill="#ffdd9a">
      <rect x="248" y="78" width="16" height="56" rx="8"/>
      <rect x="248" y="378" width="16" height="56" rx="8"/>
      <rect x="78" y="262" width="56" height="16" rx="8"/>
      <rect x="378" y="262" width="56" height="16" rx="8"/>
      <rect x="128" y="126" width="16" height="56" rx="8" transform="rotate(-45 136 154)"/>
      <rect x="368" y="126" width="16" height="56" rx="8" transform="rotate(45 376 154)"/>
      <rect x="128" y="348" width="16" height="56" rx="8" transform="rotate(45 136 376)"/>
      <rect x="368" y="348" width="16" height="56" rx="8" transform="rotate(-45 376 376)"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Halo circle -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="270" r="95" fill="#ffd27a" opacity="0.25"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="270" r="78" fill="#ffd27a" opacity="0.30"/>

  <!-- Central bright form (light) -->
  <g>
    <radialGradient id="g1" cx="50%" cy="40%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff4c7" stop-opacity="1"/>
      <stop offset="45%" stop-color="#ffe08a" stop-opacity="0.95"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffb84d" stop-opacity="0.0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <circle cx="256" cy="270" r="110" fill="url(#g1)"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Lamp / bulb silhouette (no text) -->
  <g transform="translate(0,8)">
    <!-- Base -->
    <path d="M206 382c0-22 16-38 50-38s50 16 50 38c0 14-9 25-22 31-18 9-40 9-58 0-13-6-20-17-20-31z" fill="#2a2f4e" opacity="0.95"/>
    <path d="M218 385c0-16 13-28 38-28s38 12 38 28c0 10-6 18-16 22-14 6-32 6-44 0-10-4-16-12-16-22z" fill="#3a4270"/>

    <!-- Bulb body -->
    <path d="M180 250c0-52 36-98 76-98s76 46 76 98c0 33-15 58-35 78-12 12-19 25-19 41h-4c0-16-7-29-19-41-20-20-35-45-35-78z" fill="#ffd27a" opacity="0.18"/>
    <path d="M196 250c0-44 30-82 60-82s60 38 60 82c0 27-12 48-29 64-13 12-23 27-23 45h-16c0-18-10-33-23-45-17-16-29-37-29-64z" fill="#ffdf9f" opacity="0.35"/>
    <path d="M206 250c0-37 24-66 50-66s50 29 50 66c0 22-9 39-23 52-14 13-27 31-27 54h-0c0-23-13-41-27-54-14-13-23-30-23-52z" fill="#fff4c7" opacity="0.55"/>

    <!-- Light rays from bulb -->
    <g>
      <path d="M256 150c-10 22-12 40-8 64" stroke="#ffe59a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.85"/>
      <path d="M256 150c10 22 12 40 8 64" stroke="#ffe59a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.75"/>
      <path d="M196 210c20 4 36 14 48 30" stroke="#ffe59a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.65"/>
      <path d="M316 210c-20 4-36 14-48 30" stroke="#ffe59a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Soft highlight -->
    <ellipse cx="235" cy="218" rx="26" ry="44" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.22"/>
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="232" rx="18" ry="34" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.14"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Subtle vignette -->
  <radialGradient id="v" cx="50%" cy="45%" r="70%">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0b1020" stop-opacity="0"/>
    <stop offset="70%" stop-color="#0b1020" stop-opacity="0.35"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0b1020" stop-opacity="0.75"/>
  </radialGradient>
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#v)"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" role="img" aria-label="enlightenment">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#0b1020"/>

      <stop offset="45%" stop-color="#ffe08a" stop-opacity="0.95"/>

  <!-- Lamp / bulb silhouette (no text) -->

    <!-- Base -->

    <!-- Light rays from bulb -->

      <path d="M256 150c10 22 12 40 8 64" stroke="#ffe59a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.75"/>

message.reasoning:
**Creating an SVG for Enlightenment**

I want to draw a concept of enlightenment using only SVG shapes and no text. A radiant light bulb with rays or a halo could work. I’m thinking of using a circle for the halo and adding sun rays along with a simple path. It’s important to keep it straightforward and visually effective while still representing "enlightenment" clearly. Let’s focus on those shapes to embody the idea!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
